title: helichrysum compactum
intro: Helichrysum compactum, also known as the small yellow everlasting, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an anti-microbial agent. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. Helichrysum compactum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
